name: AlexaSkill
description: Alexa skill plugin for Jellyfin, based on work by infinityofspace

versions.changelog: See for more details: https://github.com/paoloantinori/jellyfin-alexa-plugin/releases
See for more details: https://github.com/paoloantinori/jellyfin-alexa-plugin/releases

Migrated to Jellyfin 10.11.x (net9.0). Added PlayVideo, PlayChannel, and MediaInfo intent handlers. Fixed IUserDataRepository migration, namespace changes, CsrfTokenHandler bugs. Added test project with 118+ tests. Implemented cloud skill deletion on last user removal.
Replace broken LWA device auth with authorization code flow. Add persisted refresh token for restart recovery.
Add comprehensive README tutorial. Expand Italian voice command utterances. Fix ProgressiveResponse HttpClient reuse bug. Update manifest author attribution.
Add comprehensive README tutorial. Expand Italian voice command utterances. Fix ProgressiveResponse HttpClient reuse bug. Update manifest author attribution.
Per-intent diagnostics metrics. Voice-based user identification. APL visual templates. Utterance template generator. Dialog delegation. Queue management. Radio mode. SSML natural speech.
Add comprehensive README tutorial. Expand Italian voice command utterances. Fix ProgressiveResponse HttpClient reuse bug. Update manifest author attribution.

Add QueryArtistLibraryIntent for listing tracks/albums by artist. Add comprehensive localized voice command examples to README. Fix it-IT interaction model validation errors. Fix cross-locale AMAZON.SearchQuery slot conflicts.

Add QueryArtistLibraryIntent for listing tracks/albums by artist. Add comprehensive localized voice command examples to README. Fix it-IT interaction model validation errors. Fix cross-locale AMAZON.SearchQuery slot conflicts.

Add QueryArtistLibraryIntent for listing tracks/albums by artist. Add comprehensive localized voice command examples to README. Fix it-IT interaction model validation errors. Fix cross-locale AMAZON.SearchQuery slot conflicts.

Add SearchMediaIntent for unified search, PlayPodcastIntent, PlayByDecadeIntent, time-of-day mood playlists. Add artist metadata and rich now-playing follow-ups to MediaInfoIntent. Add time-period filtering to PlayLastAddedIntent. Enhance MarkFavoriteIntent with natural utterances. Show artist name in AudioPlayer subtitle. Fix ENQUEUE directive missing ExpectedPreviousToken. Add NLU and E2E integration test suites.

Add circuit breaker, correlation ID tracing, retry jitter, error categorization, cache metrics, response body logging. Refactor handler registration to DI auto-discovery. Add Jellyfin connectivity ping. Update APL to v1.9. Add Proactive Events API, Reminders API, Customer Profile API, and Skill Connections. Fix test isolation for parallel execution.

Add hot config propagation via ConfigurationChanged event. Add scheduled tasks for LWA token refresh (6h) and cache cleanup (1h). Fix missing Alexa.NET.Reminders, ProactiveEvents, and Profile DLLs in release package.

Fix fatal Jellyfin startup crash when Alexa manifest contains unknown EventName enum values (e.g. AMAZON.MediaContent.Available). Gracefully fall back to local manifest when cloud deserialization fails. Add safety net around SkillStartup to prevent Kestrel crash.

Fix fatal startup crash caused by AMAZON.MediaContent.Available in local manifest.json. Make DeserializeFromFile tolerant of unknown enum values. Add try-catch around ManifestSkill construction in SkillStartup.
Fix missing Alexa.NET.Reminders, ProactiveEvents, Profile DLLs in release package. Fix fatal startup crash from local manifest EventName enum.
Fix missing Alexa.NET.Reminders, ProactiveEvents, Profile DLLs in release package. Fix fatal startup crash from local manifest EventName enum.
Fix missing Alexa.NET.Reminders, ProactiveEvents, Profile DLLs in release package. Fix fatal startup crash from local manifest EventName enum.
Fix missing Alexa.NET.Reminders, ProactiveEvents, Profile DLLs in release package. Fix fatal startup crash from local manifest EventName enum.
Fix missing Alexa.NET.Reminders, ProactiveEvents, Profile DLLs in release package. Fix fatal startup crash from local manifest EventName enum.

Fix duplicate user config entries and deletion data loss (JF-152). Fix accordion UI layout (JF-153). Add skill icon URL support. Fix stale config reference in LWA callback. Redact leaked API keys from skill files.

Fix APL visuals not showing after skill recreation. Fix config Save wiping user data. Add dedicated PATCH config endpoint. Remove broken SMAPI icon upload. Replace reflection-based config setting with explicit typed assignments.

Fix APL visuals not showing after skill recreation. Fix config Save wiping user data. Add dedicated PATCH config endpoint. Remove broken SMAPI icon upload. Replace reflection-based config setting with explicit typed assignments.

Fix APL visuals not showing after skill recreation. Fix config Save wiping user data. Add dedicated PATCH config endpoint. Remove broken SMAPI icon upload. Replace reflection-based config setting with explicit typed assignments.

Fix APL visuals not showing after skill recreation. Fix config Save wiping user data. Add dedicated PATCH config endpoint. Remove broken SMAPI icon upload. Replace reflection-based config setting with explicit typed assignments.
